name: Caroline County Sch Bus Contrs
owner_or_parent: Caroline County Independent Bus Contractors, LLC (driver-owned cooperative)
recent_news: Oct 2022: Caroline County Public Schools signed a new contract with the Caroline County Independent Bus Contractors, LLC, an organization comprised of 13 bus drivers running regular routes.
fit_notes: Likely not a single acquirable operator but a Maryland-style driver-owned LLC/cooperative of independent contractors holding district routes. Each individual contractor (e.g., Bishop, Parks, Willis) is small (1-3 buses). Limited tuck-in fit unless Summit aggregates multiple Caroline County contractors.

name: Coombs Bus & Truck Svc
recent_news: No recent M&A or news identified; active FMCSA registration (USDOT 2330932) as private school-bus carrier in Leonardtown, MD.
fit_notes: Small family-owned MD school-bus contractor in St. Mary's County. Likely sub-10 buses; sized as a micro tuck-in. Useful only as part of an MD aggregation play; Summit already has scale via MSBCA-style contractor network.

name: D J 's Bus Svc LLC
districts_or_customers: likely St. Mary's County Public Schools (MD)
recent_news: No company-specific news found; presumed small MSBCA-affiliated St. Mary's County school-bus contractor based on address and category.
fit_notes: Very small (single-tier) MD school-bus contractor in St. Mary's County. Almost no public footprint; would need outbound contact via MSBCA / SMCPS transportation office. Marginal tuck-in unless rolled with other St. Mary's County operators.

name: Bendickson School Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: No recent M&A activity; SAFER/FMCSA shows ~2 power units and ~2 drivers under USDOT 939415; a separate Bert Bendickson DOT (2923232) also registered.
fit_notes: Micro family operator (~2 buses) in rural northwestern MN; employee count in source list (31) is overstated. Too small to be a standalone tuck-in for Summit; only relevant as part of a broad MN small-operator roll-up.

name: Greig's Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: likely Staples-Motley ISD 2170 and/or Pillager ISD 116 (MN)
recent_news: Active intrastate carrier (USDOT 2298452) incorporated 1987; received PPP loan during COVID; no M&A news identified.
fit_notes: Long-tenured (1987) Greig-family operator (~4 buses) in central MN. Multi-generational ownership suggests some succession risk, but scale is sub-scale for Summit; only of interest as part of a broader rural MN roll-up.
